Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackwatch Guild]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackwatch Guild is an organization Calder is familiar with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackwatch Guild is an Imperial Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The leader of the Blackwatch Guild is Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri claims to be a representative of the Blackwatch Guild.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackwatch Guild has been searching Nakothi's corpse for another heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackwatch Guild is supervised by the Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Bliss is the Head of the Blackwatch Guild.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Bliss is the Head of the Blackwatch Guild.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Bliss is the Head of the Blackwatch Guild.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
